control_name: Control Flow Integrity (CFI / Shadow Call Stack)
description: Hardware or compiler-enforced control flow integrity that validates indirect branch targets match expected types, blocking ROP/JOP chains. On ARM64, shadow call stack protects return addresses in a separate stack.

cvss_vector_impacts.rationale: ROP/JOP gadget chains are detected and blocked at runtime

verification.method: Check kernel config for CFI or Shadow Call Stack
